note: Public-safe healing registry for the auto-build-failed-healing bot. NO secrets, tokens, or private tactics. Each pattern: id, human title, match[] (lowercase substrings searched in the failure log), severity (P0/P1/P2/P3), safe_fix (human description), fixer (optional id of a deterministic safe fixer the bot may run), commands[] (validation to run), requires_pr (always true — bot never pushes main).

patterns.title: Generated data JSON conflict / drift
patterns.safe_fix: Take main for auto-generated data files, then regenerate via existing scripts (build_references.py). Never keep stale PR data.

patterns.title: Stale public/ build artifact
patterns.safe_fix: Remove the stale public/ output directory (gitignored) and rebuild from clean content.

patterns.title: Missing generated references data
patterns.safe_fix: Regenerate data/references.json with scripts/build_references.py before zola build.

patterns.title: Tera filter uses Python-style kwargs (replace old=/new=)
patterns.safe_fix: Tera replace uses from=/to=, not Python old=/new=. Fix the template filter call. Requires human review of the template (manual PR).

patterns.title: Tera does not support Python .items()/method calls
patterns.safe_fix: Replace Python-style .items() usage with valid Tera-compatible iteration or simplify data access. Requires template review (manual PR).

patterns.title: Python-style ternary inside Tera set
patterns.safe_fix: Tera has no Python ternary. Convert `{% set x = a if cond else b %}` to an if/elif/else block. Requires template review (manual PR).

patterns.title: Missing template partial / include
patterns.safe_fix: A referenced template/include is missing. Restore the partial or fix the include path. Requires template review (manual PR).

patterns.title: FAQ frontmatter uses question=/answer= instead of q=/a=
patterns.safe_fix: Rename FAQ frontmatter keys question=/answer= to q=/a= (line-anchored, frontmatter only). Deterministic and safe.

patterns.title: Broken internal link (safe route remap)
patterns.safe_fix: Fix internal 404 links by remapping to the nearest valid route using qa-404-checker.py --fix (source .md only).

patterns.title: CSS display:* overrides [hidden] (auth UI locked)
patterns.safe_fix: Add `[hidden]{display:none!important}` for elements toggled by JS hidden. Verify /auth/me, credentials include, cleanup auth query, prevent double init, clear loading in finally. Auth-adjacent → manual PR review.

patterns.title: Expected route has no content route
patterns.safe_fix: Create a real Zola content route and verify public/<route>/index.html exists after build. Requires content review (manual PR).

patterns.title: Pages configure rate limit (V5)
patterns.safe_fix: Advisory only — deploy.yml already retries with exponential backoff + continue-on-error. Do not block; report.

patterns.title: External link timeout / quota (advisory)
patterns.safe_fix: Advisory only — external link/quota failures must not block deploy. Report and continue.

patterns.title: SEO / compliance content warning (advisory)
patterns.safe_fix: Advisory only — SEO/compliance/content warnings are report-only and must not block deploy.
